scripts.compile: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:transport && pnpm run compile:webview && pnpm run compile:extension
scripts.test: pnpm -F @hivefetch/core run test && pnpm -F hivefetch run test
scripts.test:all: pnpm -F @hivefetch/core run test && pnpm -F hivefetch run test && pnpm -F @hivefetch/ui run test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm -F @hivefetch/core run test && pnpm -F hivefetch run test:coverage
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf node_modules dist out build && rm -rf node_modules
